text:
Aromatherapy Girl 発香少女 - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is thus required for a player to complete the game. 
__NOTOC__

Summary

Aromatherapy Girl 発香少女 - This is the Aromatherapy Girl NPC in card form. When gained, this girl emits the most comfortable and pleasant aroma for the caster. When she is by the player's side, they will be completely free of any stress. This also allows for a calm mind, enabling the player to think more clearly.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.048 :: 発香少女 
あなたにとって最も心地よい香りを出す少女。そばにいるだけで、ストレスが解消され元気になる。
|-
![Eng]
|No.048 :: Aromatherapy Girl 
A girl that gives off pleasant smells. Just being by your side helps to eliminate stress and is quite healthy.
|}
